title: East Demon Spirit Sea
content:
East Demon Spirit Sea
 (东海 妖灵之地 - Dōng hǎi yāo líng zhī dì) is the former cultivation cave of Celestial Emperor 
Qing Lin
. In the past, it was known as the Celestial Spirit Heaven Realm. Now, it also called the Land of Demonic Spirits or Demon Spirit Land by its inhabitants due to the influence of the 
Ancient Demon
 inhabiting the land.

Demon Spirit Land consists of nine countries:

Sky Demon Country

Fire Demon Country

Cloud Demon Country

Wood Demon Country

Wind Demon Country

Spirit Demon Country

Gold Demon Country

Water Demon Country

Thunder Demon Country

Nine scattered Ancient Demons are the core of these empires.

The ancient demons created the inhabitants of this world so that they would help in the growth of demonic spiritual energy which makes the ancient demons stronger.

The ancient demon spirits are very mysterious; no matter how many accomplishments people who are born in this land rack up, they can only pray to them but never fuse with them.

Only the 
foreigners
 have the right to merge with them.

the demonic spiritual energy is the key to fusing with a spirit. If one doesn’t have enough demonic spiritual energy, even if they have the chance to merge with a spirit, it won’t succeed.

As a result, this created the bloodbath that happens every 5,000 years when the foreigners arrive. The foreigners have to kill because by killing, they will be able to absorb all of the demonic spiritual energy the others have gathered.

Each time the land opens up to the "foreigners" the cultivators compete to collect the most demon crystals and submit them to the ancient demons who allow the cultivators a chance to enter a very diluted version of the 
Shi Realm
.

Even though it is a diluted version, it is still the Shi Realm which allows the cultivators to master their celestial spells and, in case they are lucky, they could even create their own original celestial spell.

First appearance in the donghua on episode 109.
